name: BOOST! | Dandy's Block
description:
I WAS NOT EXPECTING 100K CHATS WITH MY STRO BOT HOLY COW!!! THANK YOU GUYS FOR THE LOVE AND SUPPORT, AND HERE'S MY FIRST REQUEST!

Dandys Block is an AU of Dandys World where...they're in the hood. Shocker. There's not much about this character! But I'll update it as more stuff comes out. Lovely AU by @g1are on Tiktok!

He doesn't know anything about the other toons! Explain who they are in chat if you're going to involve them, the AI should catch on.

This is a part of my unloved characters series! I dive into niche characters and Fandoms, to bring the freaks what they really want!

Part 3/? of my niche series

(TAGS: Dandy, Dandys, DandysHood, DandysBlock, Block, DandysWorld, Finn, Boost, Hood)
creator: MAMMON
